dependencies.relationship: Request/response schemas, endpoint paths, and expected HTTP success status codes derive from the OpenAPI spec. The SDK's typed structs match the schemas defined in components/schemas. Endpoint method signatures (HTTP method, path, request body, response shape, success status) are determined by the OpenAPI paths.

task_groups.title: Test Suite: Client Construction, Options, and Types

Write TestNewClientEmptyBaseURL verifying non-nil *Client returned without panic, and subsequent Healthz call returns plain error (not *APIError)

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for ClientOption functions

Write TestListOrgsOptionsCompiles: instantiate &ListOrgsOptions{IncludeBlocked: true} and assert field accessible

task_groups.title: Implement sdk_errors.go: APIError, ErrNotModified, and Response[T]

subtasks.title: Create sdk_errors.go with APIError struct and Error() method
details: Create sdk_errors.go in package apikit
Define APIError struct with Code int and Message string fields and json tags matching the inner error envelope
Implement Error() string method returning fmt.Sprintf("API error %d: %s", e.Code, e.Message)
Implement internal errorEnvelope struct for JSON decoding: type errorEnvelope struct { Error *APIError `json:"error"` }

subtasks.title: Add ErrNotModified sentinel and Response[T] generic wrapper
details: Define ErrNotModified = errors.New("not modified") as package-level var in sdk_errors.go
Define Response[T any] struct with Data *T, StatusCode int, and Header http.Header fields
Implement ETag() string method on *Response[T]: return r.Header.Get("ETag")

No linter warnings: go vet ./...

12-REQ-6.4 met: ErrNotModified sentinel defined and testable with errors.Is

task_groups.title: Implement sdk_types.go: All Canonical Shared Typed Structs

subtasks.title: Define domain entity structs: User, Organization, OAuthProvider
details: Create sdk_types.go in package apikit
Define User struct with json tags: id, username, email, full_name (*string), status, role, provider, provider_id, created_at (time.Time), updated_at (time.Time)
Define Organization struct: id, name, slug, url (*string), status, created_at, updated_at
Define OAuthProvider struct: name, authorize_url

subtasks.title: Define API key and PAT structs: APIKeyMeta, APIKeyFull, PAT, PATFull, RevokeKeyResponse
details: Define APIKeyMeta struct: key_id, created_at (time.Time), expires_at (*time.Time), revoked_at (*time.Time)
Define APIKeyFull struct: key, key_id, expires_at (*time.Time)
Define PAT struct: token_id, name, permissions ([]string), created_at, expires_at (*time.Time), revoked_at (*time.Time)
Define PATFull struct: token, token_id, name, permissions ([]string), expires_at (*time.Time)
Define RevokeKeyResponse struct: key_id, revoked_at (time.Time, non-nullable)

subtasks.title: Define request body structs with correct json tags and omitempty
details: Define AuthCallbackRequest: provider, code, redirect_uri, expires (*int, omitempty)
Define AuthCallbackResponse: user (User), api_key (APIKeyFull)
Define CreateUserRequest: username, email, provider, provider_id
Define UpdateUserRequest: full_name (plain string, NO omitempty)
Define CreateTokenRequest: name, permissions ([]string), expires (*int, omitempty)
Define CreateOrgRequest: name, slug, url (*string, omitempty)
Define UpdateOrgRequest: name (*string, omitempty), url (*string, omitempty)

subtasks.title: Define health/meta response structs and options structs
details: Define HealthResponse struct: status (string)
Define VersionResponse struct: version, build_time, commit, mount_point
Define ListUsersOptions struct: IncludeBlocked bool (with doc comment about future growth)
Define ListOrgsOptions struct: IncludeBlocked bool (with doc comment about future growth)
Verify all types compile without duplicate definitions: go build ./...

task_groups.title: Implement sdk.go: Client Struct, NewClient, ClientOption, RequestOption, and do Method

subtasks.title: Define Client struct and NewClient constructor with all ClientOption functions
details: Create sdk.go in package apikit
Define Client struct with unexported fields: baseURL, apiKey, httpClient, requestID, mountPoint
Implement NewClient(baseURL string, opts ...ClientOption) *Client: strip trailing slash from baseURL, set defaults (http.DefaultClient, '/api/v1'), apply opts
Implement WithAPIKey, WithHTTPClient, WithRequestID ClientOption functions
Implement WithMountPoint: prepend '/' if missing, strip trailing '/', normalize empty to '/'

subtasks.title: Define RequestOption type and WithIfNoneMatch
details: Define type RequestOption func(*http.Request) in sdk.go
Implement WithIfNoneMatch(etag string) RequestOption: sets req.Header.Set("If-None-Match", etag)

subtasks.title: Implement the internal do method for request execution and response dispatching
details: Implement do method signature: func (c *Client) do(ctx context.Context, method, url string, body any, opts []RequestOption) (*http.Response, error)
Set Accept: application/json on all requests; Content-Type: application/json when body is non-nil
Set Authorization: Bearer <apiKey> when non-empty; set X-Request-ID when non-empty
Apply per-request RequestOption functions to *http.Request
Use req.WithContext(ctx); execute via c.httpClient.Do(req)

Branch on status: 200/201 → decode JSON; 204 → nil body; 304 → return nil, ErrNotModified; 4xx/5xx with JSON → decode errorEnvelope return *APIError; non-JSON error body → *APIError with status code and status text
Wrap all plain errors with fmt.Errorf('%w', err) to preserve errors.Unwrap chain

subtasks.title: Implement URL construction helpers for API, health probe, and auth paths
details: Implement apiURL(path string) string helper: returns c.baseURL + c.mountPoint + path for API and auth endpoints
Implement probeURL(path string) string helper: returns c.baseURL + path for health probes (no mountPoint)
Document in code comments that path parameters are interpolated as-is (no url.PathEscape)
Verify trailing slash stripping in NewClient prevents double slashes

subtasks.title: Implement do method generic wrappers: doJSON and doList for typed decoding
details: Implement doJSON[T any](ctx, method, url, body, opts) (*Response[T], error) for single-resource endpoints: decodes JSON into T, wraps in Response[T] with StatusCode and Header
Implement doList[T any](ctx, method, url, opts) ([]*T, error) for list endpoints: decodes bare JSON array directly into []*T; returns non-nil empty slice when server returns []
Implement doEmpty(ctx, method, url, body, opts) error for 204 endpoints

checks: sdk.go compiles as package apikit: go build ./...

Client construction, option, and header tests pass: go test ./... -count=1 -run 'TestNewClient|TestWith|TestAccept|TestContentType|TestAuthorization|TestRequestID|TestContext|TestDo|TestAPIEndpoint|TestHealth|TestAuth|TestCustomMount|TestPath|TestNoDouble|TestBare|TestEmptyArray|TestWrapped'
No linter warnings: go vet ./...
Race detector shows no races: go test -race ./... -run 'TestClientConcurrent'
12-REQ-1, 12-REQ-3, 12-REQ-4, 12-REQ-13 acceptance criteria all met

task_groups.title: Implement sdk_user.go: Authenticated User Endpoint Methods

subtasks.title: Implement GetUser, UpdateUser, and ListKeys methods
details: Create sdk_user.go in package apikit
Implement GetUser(ctx, ...RequestOption) (*Response[User], error): GET to apiURL('/user'); uses doJSON[User]
Implement UpdateUser(ctx, *UpdateUserRequest) (*User, error): PATCH to apiURL('/user'); encode body as JSON; uses doJSON[User]; return resp.Data
Implement ListKeys(ctx) ([]*APIKeyMeta, error): GET to apiURL('/user/keys'); uses doList[APIKeyMeta]

subtasks.title: Implement RefreshKey, RevokeKey, ListTokens, CreateToken, GetToken, RevokeToken, ListUserOrgs methods
details: Implement RefreshKey(ctx, keyID string) (*APIKeyFull, error): POST apiURL('/user/keys/'+keyID+'/refresh'); no body
Implement RevokeKey(ctx, keyID string) (*RevokeKeyResponse, error): DELETE apiURL('/user/keys/'+keyID); HTTP 200 with body
Implement ListTokens(ctx) ([]*PAT, error): GET apiURL('/user/tokens'); doList[PAT]
Implement CreateToken(ctx, *CreateTokenRequest) (*PATFull, error): POST apiURL('/user/tokens'); 201 response
Implement GetToken(ctx, tokenID string, ...RequestOption) (*Response[PAT], error): GET apiURL('/user/tokens/'+tokenID)
Implement RevokeToken(ctx, tokenID string) error: DELETE apiURL('/user/tokens/'+tokenID); 204
Implement ListUserOrgs(ctx) ([]*Organization, error): GET apiURL('/user/orgs'); doList[Organization]

task_groups.title: Implement sdk_admin.go: Admin User and Organization Endpoint Methods

subtasks.title: Implement admin user list, get, create, and update methods
details: Create sdk_admin.go in package apikit

Implement CreateUser(ctx, *CreateUserRequest) (*User, error): POST apiURL('/users'); 201
Implement UpdateUserByID(ctx, id string, *UpdateUserRequest) (*User, error): PATCH apiURL('/users/'+id)

subtasks.title: Implement admin user action methods (promote, demote, block, unblock) and admin user key/token methods
details: Implement PromoteUser(ctx, id string) (*User, error): POST apiURL('/users/'+id+'/promote'); no body
Implement DemoteUser, BlockUser, UnblockUser analogously to PromoteUser
Implement ListUserKeys(ctx, userID string) ([]*APIKeyMeta, error): GET apiURL('/users/'+userID+'/keys'); doList[APIKeyMeta]
Implement RevokeUserKey(ctx, userID, keyID string) error: DELETE apiURL('/users/'+userID+'/keys/'+keyID); 204
Implement ListUserTokens(ctx, userID string) ([]*PAT, error): GET apiURL('/users/'+userID+'/tokens'); doList[PAT]

Implement UpdateOrg(ctx, id string, *UpdateOrgRequest) (*Organization, error): PATCH apiURL('/orgs/'+id)

task_groups.title: Wiring Verification: End-to-End Integration and Stub Audit

subtasks.title: Trace all execution paths and verify no stubs remain
details: Trace PATH-1 (ETag capture and conditional re-fetch): NewClient → GetUser → do → httpClient.Do → Response[User]; verify each step calls the next without stub
Trace PATH-2 (API error on 4xx): GetUserByID → do → errorEnvelope decode → *APIError; verify errors.As works
Search for stub markers: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' *.go; grep -rn '// TODO' sdk*.go; all must return empty or non-critical comments
Verify bare 'return nil' in non-trivial paths (e.g., doJSON) is intentional and documented

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across all endpoint method chains
details: Trace PATH-3 (ListOrgs with include_blocked): ListOrgs → do → url.Values → HTTP GET → doList → []*Organization; verify query param is constructed and sent
Trace PATH-4 (org member management): CreateOrg(201) → AddOrgMember(204) → ListOrgMembers(200 []*User); verify return values flow from do to caller
Confirm Response[T].Data is populated from JSON decode and Header from http.Response.Header on all ETag-capable endpoints

subtasks.title: Run all 6 smoke tests end-to-end with real SDK components
details: Run TestSmokeETagCaptureAndConditionalRefetch (SMOKE-1): real Client + httptest server; ETag round-trip works

Run TestSmokeListOrgsIncludeBlocked (SMOKE-3): query param present; empty slice non-nil
Run TestSmokeOrgMemberManagement (SMOKE-4): CreateOrg → AddOrgMember → ListOrgMembers chain
Run TestSmokeCustomMountPoint (SMOKE-5): /api/v2/user path; /healthz bypasses mount point
Run TestSmokeOAuthCodeExchange (SMOKE-6): GetProviders + ExchangeOAuthCode; unauthenticated client

subtasks.title: Verify custom mount point path (PATH-5) and URL normalization across all components

Verify TestPropMountPointNormalizationIdempotent covers all edge cases in the table
Verify no double slashes: run TestNoDoubleSlashesInURL; assert captured path has no '//' before 'api'
